title: A Day in Galilee
content: The sun rises in the east over the lake. Peter is a fisherman. He sails his boat every morning. He works with his brother Andrew. One day, they saw a man on the shore. The man said, 'Follow me.' They left their nets and followed him.

title: The Good Shepherd
content: A shepherd looks after his sheep. He knows each one by name. When a sheep is lost, the shepherd searches for it. He walks up the mountain and through the valley. When he finds it, he is very happy. He carries the sheep home.

title: Faith like a Seed
content: Faith is like a small seed. You put it in the ground. You give it water. The light of the sun helps it grow. At first, you cannot see anything. But soon, a small plant appears. It grows into a big tree with many branches.
